languages.text: "Да, да, значит, я помню правильно — вы ведь были там, Лорд-капитан! Вы приказали установить эти лобные оковы..." {n}Лицо преступника дергается сильнее прежнего, вы слышите скрип зубов.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Да, да, значит, я помню правильно — вы ведь были там, Лорд-капитан! Вы приказали установить эти лобные оковы..." {n}Лицо преступника дергается сильнее прежнего, вы слышите скрип зубов.{/n}

languages.text: "Yes, yes, if I remember right — you were there, Lord Captain! You ordered the cranial shackles installed..." {n}The criminal's face twitches more violently than before, and you hear him grinding his teeth.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Да, да, значит, я помню правильно — вы ведь были там, Лорд-капитан! Вы приказали установить эти лобные оковы..." {n}Лицо преступника дергается сильнее прежнего, вы слышите скрип зубов.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Yes, yes, so I remember correctly. You were there, Lord Captain! You ordered the cranial shackles to be installed..." {n}The criminal's face twitches more violently than before, and you can hear him grinding his teeth.{/n}

"Yes, yes, so I remember correctly. You were there, Lord Captain! You ordered the cranial shackles to be installed..." {n}The criminal's face twitches more violently than before, and you can hear him grinding his teeth.{/n}

"Yes, yes, if I remember right — you were there, Lord Captain! You ordered the cranial shackles installed..." {n}The criminal's face twitches more violently than before, and you hear him grinding his teeth.{/n}

"Yes, yes, if I remember right — you were there, Lord Captain! You ordered the cranial shackles installed..." {n}The criminal's face twitches more violently than before, and you hear him grinding his teeth.{/n}

languages.text: "Ja, ja, wenn ich mich recht erinnere — Ihr wart dort, Lord Captain! Ihr habt die Installation der kranialen Fesseln befohlen ..." {n}Das Gesicht des Mannes zuckt heftiger als zuvor und du hörst das Knirschen seiner Zähne.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, if I remember right — you were there, Lord Captain! You ordered the cranial shackles installed..." {n}The criminal's face twitches more violently than before, and you hear him grinding his teeth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ja, ja, wenn ich mich recht erinnere — Ihr wart dort, Lord Captain! Ihr habt die Installation der kranialen Fesseln befohlen ..." {n}Das Gesicht des Mannes zuckt heftiger als zuvor und du hörst das Knirschen seiner Zähne.{/n}

languages.text: « Oui, oui, si je me souviens bien, vous aussi, vous étiez là, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Vous avez ordonné qu'on m'implante ces entraves crâniennes... » {n}Le visage du criminel se crispe davantage, et vous l'entendez grincer des dents.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, if I remember right — you were there, Lord Captain! You ordered the cranial shackles installed..." {n}The criminal's face twitches more violently than before, and you hear him grinding his teeth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Oui, oui, si je me souviens bien, vous aussi, vous étiez là, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Vous avez ordonné qu'on m'implante ces entraves crâniennes... » {n}Le visage du criminel se crispe davantage, et vous l'entendez grincer des dents.{/n}

languages.text: “是的，是的。我要是没记错，您当时就在现场，舰长大人！是您下令给我装上这颅骨枷锁的……”{n}罪犯脸部的抽搐比之前更剧烈了，你都能听到他咬牙切齿的声音。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, if I remember right — you were there, Lord Captain! You ordered the cranial shackles installed..." {n}The criminal's face twitches more violently than before, and you hear him grinding his teeth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “是的，是的。我要是没记错，您当时就在现场，舰长大人！是您下令给我装上这颅骨枷锁的……”{n}罪犯脸部的抽搐比之前更剧烈了，你都能听到他咬牙切齿的声音。{/n}

languages.text: «Sí, sí, si mal no recuerdo... ¡estaba ahí, Lord Capitán! Ordenó que instalaran los grilletes craneales...». {n}El rostro del criminal se retuerce con más violencia que antes y oyes cómo rechinan sus dientes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, if I remember right — you were there, Lord Captain! You ordered the cranial shackles installed..." {n}The criminal's face twitches more violently than before, and you hear him grinding his teeth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Sí, sí, si mal no recuerdo... ¡estaba ahí, Lord Capitán! Ordenó que instalaran los grilletes craneales...». {n}El rostro del criminal se retuerce con más violencia que antes y oyes cómo rechinan sus dientes.{/n}

languages.text: 「ああ、そうだ。あなたはそこにいたのですよ、大尉殿！頭蓋手錠の設置を命じたのは......"{n}犯人の顔が先ほどより激しく痙攣し、歯を食いしばる音が聞こえる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, yes, so I remember correctly. You were there, Lord Captain! You ordered the cranial shackles to be installed..." {n}The criminal's face twitches more violently than before, and you can hear him grinding his teeth.{/n}

languages.text: "Evet, yanlış hatırlamıyorsam... Sizi orada gördüm Lord Kaptan! O kafatası prangalarının takılmasını emrettiniz..." {n}Suçlunun yüzü, eskisinden daha şiddetli bir şekilde seğiriyor. Dişlerini gıcırdattığını duyuyorsun.{/n}
